title: myosotis cespitosa var. strigulosa
intro: Myosotis cespitosa var. strigulosa, also known as Alpine Forget-me-not, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have a range of health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing sore throats. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and used as a powder or tincture in herbal remedies. Additionally, its essential oil has been used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
